stemHtml: According to ICAO Doc 8168 (PANS-OPS), which of the following avionics are required to conduct a parallel instrument approach?

options.a: IFR avionics with LCD displays on the Commander's and Co-Pilot's sides.
options.b: A navigation system compliant with RNP APCH requirements.
options.c: A navigation system compliant with RNP-RNAV requirements.
options.d: Normal IFR avionics including full ILS or MLS capability.
